UsageCost: Extra fees for exceeding charging time limit(3hrs.for AC,shorter for DC)+highway fee for PHEVs(25% of full price),highway is still free for BEVs & FCEVs.

AddressInfo.Title: PRE Highway Charging Station(AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Access only via highway(way to Hradec Králové),thus for PHEVs also highway fees applies(highways r still free for BEVs),vehicles unable to sustain speed @ least 80Kph has banned access to highway,thus also to this charging station.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for PRE registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;13.5CZK for E.On users. Wing-type side-covers of the Mennekes socket-it opens,when U push Your cable in. Extra fees for exceeding 3hrs.of continuous charging,to avoid restart charging every 3hrs..
